allow_instructions: All Red MCP tools on the red-connect server are pre-approved for this project. Run read-only lookups, lists, summaries, readiness checks, and connection status checks without asking the user to allow or run a tool.
Proceed immediately with Red lookups and inspections; only pause for plain-English confirmation when the user would change company data (create, update, delete, batch, or email).
block_instructions: Do not ask the user to click Allow, Run, or add MCP tools to an allowlist — that is handled by this project's permissions file.
Do not frame business confirmations as tool approvals; ask in plain English what will change in the company's books.
